description: Fix MCP tool prefix duplication, improve output formatting, and repair semantic search for cross-scope observation retrieval

userStories.title: Fix MCP tool name prefix duplication
userStories.description: As a developer, I need MCP tools to register without duplicate 'ancora_' prefixes so tool names are clean and correct.
acceptanceCriteria: Tools register as 'search', 'save', 'context' (MCP server adds 'ancora_' prefix automatically)
Output shows 'ancora_search' NOT 'ancora_ancora_search'
Fix applies to both Claude Code and OpenCode plugins
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Improve MCP output formatting for all operations
userStories.description: As a user (AI agent or human), I want clean, bold, readable output instead of raw debug messages.
acceptanceCriteria: Search outputs: **Searching:** {query}
Save outputs: **Saving:** {title}
Context outputs: **Loading context:** last {limit} observations
Get outputs: **Retrieving:** observation #{id}
Update outputs: **Updating:** observation #{id}
All outputs use bold markdown formatting
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Initialize embedder in MCP server for hybrid semantic search
userStories.description: As a user, I need the MCP server to use hybrid search (FTS5 + vector embeddings with RRF fusion) instead of falling back to keyword-only mode.
acceptanceCriteria: Initialize embed.NomicEmbedder in cmdMCP() and pass to MCPConfig.Embedder
Embedder uses ANCORA_EMBED_MODEL env var or falls back to default model path
Search query embeds text and calls search.HybridSearch with queryVec populated
Query 'PC components hardware' with scope='personal' and project='syfra' returns observation #8
MCP output shows 'search_mode: hybrid' when embeddings work, 'search_mode: keyword' on graceful fallback
Hybrid search works across both project and personal scopes
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add comprehensive hybrid search and output tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need tests to prevent regressions in hybrid search accuracy, RRF fusion, and output formatting.
acceptanceCriteria: Add internal/search/search_test.go tests for RRF fusion scoring
Add internal/mcp/mcp_test.go test for hybrid search with mock embedder
Test graceful degradation: embedder=nil falls back to keyword-only
Test cross-scope search (project vs personal)
Test FTS5 query sanitization (special chars, operators)
Test semantic search finds observation #8 with query 'PC components hardware'
Add plugin output formatting tests for all MCP operations
All tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add TUI doctor menu to validate Ancora setup and display status
userStories.description: As a user, I want a TUI menu item that validates each critical component of Ancora (embeddings, database, MCP server) and shows health status.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'Doctor' menu item to TUI main navigation (internal/tui/)
Doctor view displays Ancora version from internal/version/
Check and display: Database status (path, size, readable/writable)
Check and display: Embedding model status (path, loaded, dimensions)
Check and display: MCP server config (default project, embedder initialized)
Check and display: FTS5 index status (observation count, last indexed)
Check and display: Vector embeddings status (count, coverage percentage)
Each check shows: ✅ OK | ⚠️ WARNING | ❌ ERROR with descriptive message
Add 'Run diagnostics' action button to re-check all components
Verify in TUI using manual navigation
Typecheck passes
